name: Quick Bacon-Spinach Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw and drain one 10-oz package of frozen, chopped spinach.
2. Cook 6 or 7 slices of bacon until very crisp.
3. Squeeze as much water as possible from the spinach.
4. Mix the cooked bacon and spinach with the remaining ingredients.
5. Blend well to combine.
6. Cover and chill in the refrigerator.
Makes about 2 3/4 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Apples, Fennel, Zucchini, Monterey Jack or Cheddar Cheese Sticks, Toast Triangles, Pears
